About ICIIT 2021

 

2021 International Conference on Intelligent Information Technology (ICIIT 2021)  has been held successfully in Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam (Online) during February 25-28, 2021.

Publication: ACM Conference Proceedings (ISBN: 978-1-4503-8894-8), indexed by Ei Compendex and Scopus

Best Presentation
